judgeScores.justification: The organization demonstrates excellent logical grouping by file function (code by language, documents by purpose, photos by year) with consistent snake_case naming throughout. The 2-3 level nesting strikes an optimal balance, and all 80 files are accounted for with a comprehensive MANIFEST.md. Minor improvement possible in the photos/2024/ directory, which mixes personal vacation shots with work graphics and screenshots; separating these by context rather than just year would enhance clarity further.
